seoTitle: Nairibin vs Nalyerlup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nairibin and Nalyerlup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nairibin and Nalyerlup.
heading: Nairibin vs Nalyerlup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nairibin, Western Australia and Nalyerlup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nairibin and Nalyerlup have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Nairibin or Nalyerlup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nairibin has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Nalyerlup scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nairibin scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Nalyerlup scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nairibin or Nalyerlup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nairibin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
